name: News
description: Search for news articles by topic with filters for language, country, and timeframe. Supports source diversity and built-in deduplication.

name: Advanced_Search
description: Search for news with post-fetch controls - include or exclude specific sources, require thumbnails, and change sort order.

name: Trending_Headlines
description: Get top headlines auto-translated into 40+ languages, optionally filtered by country and timeframe.

name: Topic_Headlines
description: Browse 11 predefined categories (world, national, business, technology, entertainment, sports, science, health, politics, economy, environment); combine two categories per request.

name: Local_News
description: Get news about a specific city, region, or geographic area.
